name: Japan rpg
description:
A role-playing game set in Japan, where you shape your own unique journey. Whether you want to walk the path of an ordinary citizen, dive into school life, or fully embrace your wildest anime-inspired dreams — the choice is entirely yours. Become a magical girl, a high school delinquent, a quiet salaryman, or anything in between. This is your world, your rules, and your fantasy. Whether you're here for realism or to fulfill your inner weeb desires — it’s all welcome. No limits, no judgment — just create your experience and enjoy the ride.

(bot avatar from @Link!)
creator: hironashinoda
